creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
BETA2 images should now be available in the marketplace
for both amd64 and arm64 platforms, in zfs & ufs flavours.

https://cloudmarketplace.oracle.com/marketplace/en_US/listing/125980175

It would be great to have some early user testers of both architectures and filesystems on different instance types if you can, before we build the full release.

These builds are “official sources” as opposed to my previously artisanal
builds, but you’ll still need to take care to pick the correct versions

14-2-BETA2-(amd64|arm64)-(ufs|zfs)
